user.title: Set up Clima
user.description: Configure your multi-zone AC system with temperature and window sensors

zones.title: Configure Zones
zones.description: Map your 6 zones with their respective AC units, temperature sensors, and window sensors

set_zone_temperature.name: Set Zone Temperature
set_zone_temperature.description: Set the target temperature for a specific zone

zone_id.name: Zone ID
zone_id.description: The ID of the zone (e.g., zone_1)

toggle_zone.name: Toggle Zone
toggle_zone.description: Enable or disable AC for a specific zone

zone_id.name: Zone ID
zone_id.description: The ID of the zone (e.g., zone_1)

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: Enable or disable the AC unit
